title: Where Annex 1 Audits Find the Most
alt: Five high-risk focus areas in a sterile Annex 1 audit

items.label: Contamination Control Strategy
items.desc: Integrated, risk-justified CCS — not a list of stapled SOPs

items.label: Aseptic Process Simulation
items.desc: Worst-case media fills with representative interventions

items.label: Environmental & Personnel Monitoring
items.desc: Risk-justified locations, limits, trending and excursions

items.label: Barrier Technology
items.desc: RABS/isolator integrity, gloves and decontamination cycles

items.label: Personnel & Gowning
items.desc: Qualification, aseptic technique and first-air protection

items.label: Utilities
items.desc: Water, clean steam and gases controlled to point of use
